text:
/etc/rc.conf :

rc_debug="YES"
grafana3_conf="/usr/local/noc/var/etc/grafana/grafana.ini"
grafana3_enable="YES"


#service grafana3 start
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/grafana3: DEBUG: pid file (/var/run/grafana3/grafana3.pid): not readable.
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/grafana3: DEBUG: checkyesno: grafana3_enable is set to YES.
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/grafana3: DEBUG: run_rc_command: start_precmd: grafana_precmd 
Starting grafana3.
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/grafana3: DEBUG: run_rc_command: doit: limits -C daemon su -m grafana -c 'sh -c "/usr/sbin/daemon  -f -c -p /var/run/grafana3/grafana3.pid /usr/local/bin/grafana-server -config=/usr/local/etc/grafana3.conf -homepath=/usr/local/share/grafana/"'
